heading: Machinery belting processed from cotton; exemption from tax
label: 621 Machinery belting processed from cotton; exemption from tax
text: The provisions of , shall not apply to articles of machinery belting processed wholly or in chief value from cotton, if such processing was completed prior to .section 616 of this titleJanuary 1, 1930
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Agricultural Adjustment Act which comprises this chapter.
ConstitutionalityUnconstitutionality of processing and floor stock taxes, see note set out under .section 616 of this title
